acceptance: SqliteTaskRepository implements TaskRepositoryPort: findById, findAll, save, delete
SqliteUnitOfWork implements UnitOfWorkPort: run(callback) с BEGIN/COMMIT/ROLLBACK
Composite same-profile ownership на WHERE clauses: (profile_id, id) пары везде
Mappers camelCase ↔ snake_case без потерь (round-trip test)
0 Math.random(), 0 new Date() в repository коде (DateProvider/IdProvider port для injection)
UoW atomicity test: completeTask chain в transaction → rollback на failure не оставляет partial XP
notes: Db_migration tier: ВСЕ critics обязательны. Production-runtime persistence. Challenge target: same-profile ownership, UoW atomicity, mapper correctness, no Math.random/new Date.
